title: Fluidity
description: This project adds Smooth animations, Vibrance, and overhauls to the existing minecraft loop!
body:
# I try to update EVERY WEEK
 
🌊 Fluidity - Bring Your Minecraft to Life 
Step into a smoother, faster, and more expressive Minecraft experience. Fluidity transforms the game with smooth animations, polished movement, and subtle visual touches that make every action feel alive. From refined swinging and item interactions to seamless transitions and movement details, everything flows with natural, cinematic motion!

But it’s not just about looks Fluidity also packs performance boosts and QOL upgrades to keep your gameplay running sharp and responsive. Whether you're exploring, fighting, building, or just vibing, the world feels more immersive, more modern, and way more fun.

✨ Highlights:

🌀 Smooth, dynamic action animations

⚡ Smart optimizations for better performance

🎮 Clean QOL improvements

🔧 Zero bloat - everything enhances the core game

🌟 Perfect for survival, PvP, or modded adventures

Dive in and feel your game move like never before.
Welcome to Fluidity where everything just flows. 🌊
